date_notes: FOI records show meeting and ministry exploration occurred in 2024; exact dates within that period to confirm.
title_en: FOI reveals ministry explored accrediting private online academy
title_fr: Une demande d'accès à l'information révèle que le ministère a exploré l'accréditation d'une académie privée en ligne
description_en: FOI records show the Premier met with Jordan Peterson and that Advanced Education officials examined a path to recognise the online, US-based Peterson Academy. The ministry stated no formal accreditation proposal was received.
